channel.title: Game on Christos Tsanikidis - CS, Math, Life
channel.description: Recent content in Game on Christos Tsanikidis - CS, Math, Life

item.title: Warcraft 3 Mod - Pimp my Peon
item.description: Pimp my Peon was the first contact I had with programming at the age of 15-16 and very influential to the later developed interests. Alternatively you might consider it as an early indication of an innate fascination for the art of “creation” using technology. It is documented here for historical reasons. It was a mod for Warcraft 3, like the famous Dota 1, which had begun as an open source project and was then “forked” by young me.
